channel.title: Posts on Depechie’s outing
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Depechie’s outing

item.title: OpenTelemetry on Azure Container Apps Revisited - Managed OpenTelemetry Agent
item.description: Last time I visited this topic, I was met with some challenges! It took a lot of manual crafting to get the OpenTelemetry Collector configured correctly, both for receiving observability data as for sending it to Grafana Cloud. Although it worked, it was far from ideal.

item.title: OpenTelemetry on Azure Container Apps
item.description: Lately I’ve been working with OpenTelemetry to setup an observability environment for our running api services. Currently everything is deployed on-premises through use of docker compose and is working perfectly, but of course we also wanted to try out a cloud hosted solution on Azure.

item.title: Maui Blazor Mobile Template
item.description: When you want to try out the .Net MAUI Blazor template, you will be able to run the standard Blazor test website on your mobile phone without any issues.

item.title: Maui Blazor Staggered View
item.description: Do you remember my staggered view solution for Xamarin Forms? If not, I blogged about it here: https://blog.depechie.cc/posts/2021-05-26-xf-staggered-view/.

item.title: Xamarin Forms staggered view - Masonry
item.description:
Some story background

When developing mobile apps, you’ll often find different design trends that look great and sometimes you even want to adopt some of those trends in your own apps.

item.title: Xamarin Forms – Set entry clear icon color on iOS
item.description: Here is a small piece of code that you can use as a Xamarin Forms effect to hook into your entry. It allows changing the color of the clear icon that is available inside the native entry control of iOS ( when enabled ).

item.title: Xamarin Forms - Custom Visual State triggers and Control Templates
item.description: Not so long ago there was this little online event called Xamarin Expert Day that featured a bunch of awesome speakers. Now one talk got my full attention, it was the one from Hussain Abbasi about Supercharge You Custom Controls With Control Templates ( re-watch it here… ).
